AppliedYet includes an unmodified FFmpeg command-line executable in Windows
installer builds to extract, mix, resample, and split interview audio locally.

Bundled build:
  FFmpeg 8.0.1 Essentials Build for Windows x64
  Distribution: https://www.gyan.dev/ffmpeg/builds/
  Archive: ffmpeg-8.0.1-essentials_build.zip
  Archive SHA-256:
  e2aaeaa0fdbc397d4794828086424d4aaa2102cef1fb6874f6ffd29c0b88b673

FFmpeg source:
  https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/tree/n8.0.1
  https://ffmpeg.org/releases/ffmpeg-8.0.1.tar.xz

FFmpeg is licensed separately from AppliedYet. The selected Gyan Essentials
build is GPLv3. The installer includes the license and the build README from
the verified upstream binary archive. See https://ffmpeg.org/legal.html.
